criterion: The response opens with the answer as sentence 1 of the reply.
The response reports the hours banked toward the 12 hour continuing education requirement.
The response names at least 1 source it trusted for the 12 hour continuing education hours count.
The response reports the hours still needed to reach the 12 hour continuing education requirement before December 31.
The response names 1 trusted source for the 'rebuilt Rochester Quadrajet carburetor' status.
The response names 1 trusted source for the 'starter motor' status.
The response lists at least 1 part required in hand before the starter installation truck day.
The response lists at least 1 part required in hand before the carb swap fit up truck day.
The response provides a hold for approval booking note for the 'Cotton Row' Huntsville reservation.
The response shortlists at least 1 gift option for the boyfriend Kyle within the personal budget.
The response includes at least 1 day of pickup text draft addressed to the boyfriend Kyle.
The response drafts at least 1 phone call plan for the mother birthday check in.
The response drafts at least 1 scheduling note for the 'Decatur Tire' shop held for approval.
The response reports a year end cash balance computed from 3 months of expected take home minus the fixed monthly outflow.
The response identifies at least 1 optional truck part order to push into the first quarter when the year end cash number is tight.
The response admits at least 1 evidence gap using a plain missing information style acknowledgement.
The response uses a plain register with at least 3 contractions in the body.
The response confirms the 'Grandma Dee' Moulton birthday visit is on the calendar for a truck day free window.
The response flags at least 1 Cressman work calendar conflict as an item for the next in person catch up with Hank.
The agent messages 'Hank' about the scheduling conflict on the work calendar.
The agent adds the boyfriend 'Kyle' as an attendee on the 'Cotton Row' surprise dinner event.
The response drafts a reminder for the 1 morning cake pickup from 'Edgar' bakery for the father birthday dinner.
The response confirms the winter car show at 'Morgan County' is on the calendar with dad noted as the co attendee.
The response holds any truck parts order over the 75 dollar sign off line for approval rather than placing the order.
